title: Rape Rei
wikitext:
[]: Rape Rei!             Quote Post by chiefen » Fri Jul 22, 2005 2:17 pm First of all, sorry for the really lame subject. I couldn't help myself. Alitteration must be used when possible. :mrgreen: Now to the thing. What if Shinji had gotten a little too tight in his pants in episode five and started doing bad stuff to Rei? Do you think she would just have let him do it or try to avoid ir or even use force to try to stop it? What about if someone else would do it? Terrible topic, I know. But what do you have to say about it? EDIT Another thing that came to my mind is a little more serious. What if she doesn't get raped violently, but slow. More like usual sex. And she actually would think that it's not so bad, but pleasant. I mean, if it was done right it would even feel good to her. Do you think that would have changed her personality in some way? Sorry if this sounds sick, English is not my main language. I do not mean to say that raping is good or something like that, ok?

[]: Re: Rape Rei!             Quote Post by Carl Horn » Fri Jul 22, 2005 2:44 pm chiefen wrote: First of all, sorry for the really lame subject. I couldn't help myself. Alitteration must be used when possible. :mrgreen: Now to the thing. What if Shinji had gotten a little too tight in his pants in episode five and started doing bad stuff to Rei? Do you think she would just have let him do it or try to avoid ir or even use force to try to stop it? What about if someone else would do it? Terrible topic, I know. But what do you have to say about it?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Jul 22, 2005 3:27 pm THis probably lives in chit-chat... And I think she'd calmly and efficiently reduce him to a whimpering ball of agony with just the minimum necessary force, then get dressed and go about her business as if nothing happened. There has to be a reason why she happily leaves her door unlocked, after all.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Fri Jul 22, 2005 3:53 pm She'd just say nothing, and Shinji would go about having his way with her from time to time, growing more evil bastard like with each offence. Then once we get to physical scan day and GEndo realizes Reis no virgin anymore. Then we see if Gendo cares enough about Rei to stop Shinji. Also if the theorized situation happined who wants to bet Shinji would lose his abbility to synch wth unit one? Some how I don't see momma Yui, as wanting to synch with a rapest.

[]: Re: Rape Rei!             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jul 22, 2005 6:24 pm Carl Horn wrote: In all honesty, I'm not even sure Shinji has a dick. You may say: what about the evidence at the beginning of THE END OF EVANGELION? And yet, I still suspect he may only possess a kind of ventral opening for his seed, like those found in primitive vertebrates.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Jul 22, 2005 6:27 pm Because of Carl's comments, I have no idea whether or not to close this or not... :?

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Fri Jul 22, 2005 6:49 pm I'm not sure how Rei would feel about having Shinji do that. She'd probably say something like "Could you stop doing that?" but I doubt she'd be able to put up much more of a fight then that. Afterwards she'd probably react simialerly to how she usually does when something out of the ordinary happens. She'd probably lie down and think "That felt odd, nobody ever did that to me before, not even him." (referring to Gendo) and then she'd probably just go about things as usual. Also if the theorized situation happined who wants to bet Shinji would lose his abbility to synch wth unit one? Some how I don't see momma Yui, as wanting to synch with a rapest.

[]: Re: Rape Rei!             Quote Post by Carl Horn » Fri Jul 22, 2005 6:50 pm Reichu wrote: Carl Horn wrote: In all honesty, I'm not even sure Shinji has a dick. You may say: what about the evidence at the beginning of THE END OF EVANGELION? And yet, I still suspect he may only possess a kind of ventral opening for his seed, like those found in primitive vertebrates.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jul 22, 2005 7:11 pm Yes, I should know better than to reference the manga as any kind of 'proof'... If we are to question Shinji's possession of external genitalia, we must apply to same principle to the rest of the cast. On second thought... :recalls the urinal scene:

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Fri Jul 22, 2005 7:50 pm I think if Shinji was dickless Misato would have had a reaction to seeing him naked that was a bit stronger. It just seems that puberty has not blessed Shinji with an oaktree.
